requirement_topic.en: SBEE / CEB Grid Connection for BESS — 220/380 V 50 Hz System, IEC 62933, ARE Licensing, and Project-Specific Connection Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: SBEE / CEB BESS并网——220/380 V 50 Hz系统、IEC 62933、ARE许可及项目专属并网要求
requirement_topic.zht: SBEE / CEB BESS併網——220/380 V 50 Hz系統、IEC 62933、ARE許可及項目專屬併網要求

summary.en: Benin's electricity sector is structured around two main entities: SBEE (Société Béninoise d'Énergie Électrique), which manages distribution and some local generation, and CEB (Communauté Électrique du Bénin), a bilateral transmission operator co-owned by Benin and Togo that handles bulk power supply and high-voltage interconnection with the WAPP (West African Power Pool) network. Benin's grid operates at 220/380 V, 50 Hz — nominally the same voltage and frequency as China's grid, meaning BESS power conversion systems (PCS) designed for China's grid require less electrical re-parameterisation than for markets such as the Gulf (240/415 V) or North America (60 Hz). ARE (Autorité de Régulation de l'Électricité), the sector regulator, is responsible for issuing operating licences to independent power producers and storage project developers, and for monitoring compliance with applicable technical standards. No publicly accessible SBEE or CEB grid code specifically addressing BESS grid connection had been confirmed from official sources as of the dataset date; project-specific connection agreement terms must be obtained directly from SBEE or CEB. Donor-financed projects (MCC Compact, World Bank, AFD/Proparco) commonly require compliance with IEC 62933 (Electrical Energy Storage Systems) series standards including IEC 62933-2-1 (Unit Parameters and Testing Methods) and IEC 62933-5-2 (Safety Requirements for electrochemical-based systems) in their project specifications. High ambient temperatures (Benin's average daily maximum exceeds 30 °C in most regions) and harmattan dust conditions require thermal and dust derating design for BESS containerised enclosures and PCS equipment.
summary.zh: 贝宁电力行业围绕两个主要实体构建：SBEE（贝宁电力公司），负责配电和部分本地发电；CEB（贝宁电力共同体），由贝宁和多哥共同持有，负责大宗电力供应和与WAPP（西非电力联盟）互联网络的高压互联。贝宁电网运行参数为220/380 V 50 Hz——与中国电网名义电压和频率相同，意味着为中国电网设计的BESS储能变流器（PCS）所需电气重新参数化工作少于海湾（240/415 V）或北美（60 Hz）等市场。ARE（电力监管局）是行业监管机构，负责向独立发电商和储能项目开发商颁发经营许可证，并监督适用技术标准的合规情况。截至本数据集日期，尚未从官方来源确认公开发布的专门针对BESS并网的SBEE或CEB电网规范；项目专属并网协议条款须直接向SBEE或CEB获取。捐助方资助项目（MCC契约、世界银行、AFD/Proparco）通常在其项目规格中要求遵守IEC 62933（电化学储能系统）系列标准，包括IEC 62933-2-1（单元参数和测试方法）和IEC 62933-5-2（电化学系统安全要求）。高环境温度（贝宁大多数地区日最高气温超过30°C）和哈马丹扬尘条件要求对BESS集装箱机柜和PCS设备进行热环境和防尘降额设计。
summary.zht: 貝寧電力行業圍繞兩個主要實體構建：SBEE（貝寧電力公司），負責配電和部分本地發電；CEB（貝寧電力共同體），由貝寧和多哥共同持有，負責大宗電力供應和與WAPP（西非電力聯盟）互聯網絡的高壓互聯。貝寧電網運行參數為220/380 V 50 Hz——與中國電網名義電壓和頻率相同，意味著為中國電網設計的BESS儲能變流器（PCS）所需電氣重新參數化工作少於海灣（240/415 V）或北美（60 Hz）等市場。ARE（電力監管局）是行業監管機構，負責向獨立發電商和儲能項目開發商頒發經營許可證，並監督適用技術標準的合規情況。截至本數據集日期，尚未從官方來源確認公開發布的專門針對BESS併網的SBEE或CEB電網規範；項目專屬併網協議條款須直接向SBEE或CEB獲取。捐助方資助項目（MCC契約、世界銀行、AFD/Proparco）通常在其項目規格中要求遵守IEC 62933（電化學儲能系統）系列標準，包括IEC 62933-2-1（單元參數和測試方法）和IEC 62933-5-2（電化學系統安全要求）。高環境溫度（貝寧大多數地區日最高氣溫超過30°C）和哈馬丹揚塵條件要求對BESS集裝箱機櫃和PCS設備進行熱環境和防塵降額設計。

standards_or_laws: ARE (Autorité de Régulation de l'Électricité) — operating licence required for independent power producers and storage project developers in Benin; licence conditions set technical compliance obligations
SBEE (Société Béninoise d'Énergie Électrique) — distribution network connection; project-specific connection agreement required; no confirmed public BESS grid code as of dataset date
CEB (Communauté Électrique du Bénin) — transmission operator for Benin and Togo; bulk supply and high-voltage interconnection; project-specific terms apply
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected reference in donor-financed project specifications)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected reference in donor-financed project specifications)
WAPP (West African Power Pool) — regional interconnection body; technical standards for cross-border power flow and grid stability may apply to utility-scale BESS projects

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2023 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised procedures. China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V — nominally the same as Benin's grid, meaning PCS voltage protection thresholds designed for China's grid do not require the voltage-step reconfiguration needed for Gulf or North American markets. However, thermal management, dust ingress protection (IP rating), and derating specifications for Benin's tropical and harmattan-dust environment must be verified against the PCS and container design — Chinese products are typically validated at 25 °C ambient, not at the 35–40 °C ambient conditions common in Benin.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2023（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权程序获得电网运营商认可。中国电网运行参数为50 Hz、220/380 V——与贝宁电网名义相同，意味着为中国电网设计的PCS电压保护阈值不需要海湾或北美市场所需的电压差异重新配置。然而，针对贝宁热带及哈马丹扬尘环境的热管理、防尘进入（IP等级）和降额规格须根据PCS和机柜设计进行核实——中国产品通常在25°C环境温度下验证，而非贝宁常见的35–40°C环境条件。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2023（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權程序獲得電網運營商認可。中國電網運行參數為50 Hz、220/380 V——與貝寧電網名義相同，意味著為中國電網設計的PCS電壓保護閾值不需要海灣或北美市場所需的電壓差異重新配置。然而，針對貝寧熱帶及哈馬丹揚塵環境的熱管理、防塵進入（IP等級）和降額規格須根據PCS和機櫃設計進行核實——中國產品通常在25°C環境溫度下驗證，而非貝寧常見的35–40°C環境條件。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2023 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy Benin ARE licensing or SBEE/CEB grid-connection requirements. Key areas requiring attention: (a) ARE operating licence — engage ARE early to determine applicable technical standards, licence conditions, and required documentation for storage project developers; (b) SBEE or CEB project-specific connection agreement — no public BESS grid code has been confirmed; engage SBEE or CEB at the earliest project stage to obtain technical requirements before equipment procurement; (c) IEC 62933 series evidence — where donor-financed project specifications (MCC, World Bank, AFD) require IEC 62933-2-1 or IEC 62933-5-2 evidence, this must be prepared independently of Chinese GB/T standards, which are not accepted as equivalent; (d) thermal and environmental derating — verify PCS and BESS enclosure design for Benin ambient temperature (commonly 35–40 °C peak) and harmattan dust conditions; IP55 or higher enclosure rating is typically required; (e) SCADA and communication protocols — confirm monitoring and control interface protocol required by SBEE/CEB (likely IEC 61850 or project-specific specification); (f) voltage nominal alignment — 220/380 V 50 Hz is the same nominal as China, so major PCS reconfiguration is not expected, but protection settings must be validated against Benin grid fault characteristics and the specific connection point.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不满足贝宁ARE许可或SBEE/CEB并网要求。需关注的主要方面：（a）ARE经营许可证——尽早与ARE接触，确定适用技术标准、许可条件及储能项目开发商所需文件；（b）SBEE或CEB项目专属并网协议——尚未确认公开的BESS电网规范；在设备采购前应在项目最早阶段与SBEE或CEB接触以获取技术要求；（c）IEC 62933系列证据——若捐助方资助项目规格（MCC、世界银行、AFD）要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2证据，须独立于不被接受为等效依据的中国GB/T标准进行准备；（d）热环境和环境降额——核实PCS和BESS机柜设计对贝宁环境温度（峰值通常达35–40°C）和哈马丹扬尘条件的适用性；通常要求IP55或更高的机柜防护等级；（e）SCADA和通信协议——确认SBEE/CEB要求的监控接口协议（可能为IEC 61850或项目专属规格）；（f）标称电压对齐——220/380 V 50 Hz与中国标称相同，因此预计不需要重大PCS重新配置，但保护设置须依据贝宁电网故障特性和具体并网点进行验证。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不滿足貝寧ARE許可或SBEE/CEB併網要求。需關注的主要方面：（a）ARE經營許可證——盡早與ARE接觸，確定適用技術標準、許可條件及儲能項目開發商所需文件；（b）SBEE或CEB項目專屬併網協議——尚未確認公開的BESS電網規範；在設備採購前應在項目最早階段與SBEE或CEB接觸以獲取技術要求；（c）IEC 62933系列證據——若捐助方資助項目規格（MCC、世界銀行、AFD）要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2證據，須獨立於不被接受為等效依據的中國GB/T標準進行準備；（d）熱環境和環境降額——核實PCS和BESS機櫃設計對貝寧環境溫度（峰值通常達35–40°C）和哈馬丹揚塵條件的適用性；通常要求IP55或更高的機櫃防護等級；（e）SCADA和通訊協議——確認SBEE/CEB要求的監控接口協議（可能為IEC 61850或項目專屬規格）；（f）標稱電壓對齊——220/380 V 50 Hz與中國標稱相同，因此預計不需要重大PCS重新配置，但保護設置須依據貝寧電網故障特性和具體併網點進行驗證。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ARE operating licence required for storage project developers; SBEE/CEB grid-connection approval required for all grid-connected BESS in Benin; technical requirements are project-specific and defined in the connection agreement; no confirmed public BESS-specific grid code as of dataset date
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558-2023 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Benin

source.publisher: ARE — Autorité de Régulation de l'Électricité (Benin Electricity Regulatory Authority)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy Benin ARE licensing or SBEE/CEB grid-connection requirements. The 220/380 V 50 Hz grid nominal is the same as China, reducing voltage reconfiguration burden compared to Gulf or North American markets, but thermal derating for Benin's ambient temperatures (35–40 °C peak) and harmattan dust IP protection are distinct engineering requirements that must be addressed in product and enclosure specifications. Engage ARE for operating licence requirements and SBEE or CEB at the earliest project stage for connection agreement technical requirements. Donor or lender project specifications (MCC, World Bank, AFD/Proparco) are the most practically significant compliance gates for current BESS projects in Benin — verify IEC 62933 evidence obligations in any applicable project specification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足贝宁ARE许可或SBEE/CEB并网要求。220/380 V 50 Hz电网标称与中国相同，与海湾或北美市场相比降低了电压重新配置负担，但贝宁环境温度（峰值35–40°C）下的热降额和哈马丹扬尘IP防护是必须在产品和机柜规格中解决的特殊工程要求。请与ARE接触了解经营许可证要求，并在项目最早阶段与SBEE或CEB接触获取并网协议技术要求。捐助方或贷款机构项目规格（MCC、世界银行、AFD/Proparco）是当前贝宁BESS项目中最具实际意义的合规门槛——核实任何适用项目规格中的IEC 62933证据义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足貝寧ARE許可或SBEE/CEB併網要求。220/380 V 50 Hz電網標稱與中國相同，與海灣或北美市場相比降低了電壓重新配置負擔，但貝寧環境溫度（峰值35–40°C）下的熱降額和哈馬丹揚塵IP防護是必須在產品和機櫃規格中解決的特殊工程要求。請與ARE接觸了解經營許可證要求，並在項目最早階段與SBEE或CEB接觸獲取併網協議技術要求。捐助方或貸款機構項目規格（MCC、世界銀行、AFD/Proparco）是當前貝寧BESS項目中最具實際意義的合規門檻——核實任何適用項目規格中的IEC 62933證據義務。
